**Appendix 1**

**Variable definitions**

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| **Definition of variables**                                                                 |
+:===================================+:======================================================:+
| Variable                           | Definition                                             |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| Invest                             | Cash paid for the purchase and construction of fixed   |
|                                    | assets, intangible assets, and other long-term assets  |
|                                    | / total assets at the start of the fiscal year         |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| lnCPU                              | The natural logarithm of the city-level climate policy |
|                                    | uncertainty index developed by Ma et al. (2023)*.*     |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| Size                               | The natural logarithm of total assets at the end of    |
|                                    | the fiscal year                                        |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| Lev                                | Total liabilities / total assets at the end of the     |
|                                    | fiscal year                                            |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| Growth                             | The growth rate of operating profits                   |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| ROA                                | Net profit divided by total assets at the end of the   |
|                                    | fiscal year                                            |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| Separation                         | The difference between the actual controller's control |
|                                    | rights and ownership rights                            |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| SumSalary                          | Total executive compensation, excluding allowances     |
|                                    | received by directors, supervisors, and senior         |
|                                    | executives (in 100 million RMB*)*                      |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| TobinQ                             | Market value / (total assets - net intangible assets - |
|                                    | net goodwill)                                          |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| BM                                 | The ratio of total assets to market value              |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| PGDP                               | Regional GDP per capita (in 100 thousand RMB)          |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| GGDP                               | Regional GDP growth rate                               |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| CF1                                | Operating net cash flow / total assets at the          |
|                                    | beginning of the fiscal year                           |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| CF2                                | Operating net cash flow / total assets at the end of   |
|                                    | the fiscal year                                        |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| SA                                 | SA index (Hadlock and Pierce, 2010) = -0.737 × Size +  |
|                                    | 0.043 × Size squared - 0.040 × Age, where Size = Ln    |
|                                    | (min (total assets in 2004 dollars, \$4.5 billion) )   |
|                                    | and Age = min (firm age, 37)                           |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| WW                                 | Whited-Wu (2006) index = -0.091 × Cash flow - 0.062 ×  |
|                                    | Dummy (positive dividend) + 0.021 × Long-term debt -   |
|                                    | 0.044 × Ln (total assets) + 0.102 × Sales growth for   |
|                                    | 3-digit SIC industry - 0.035 × Sales growth            |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| AR                                 | Accounts receivable divided by total sales             |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| AP                                 | Accounts payable divided by cost of goods sold         |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| Customer                           | Sales to the top five customers divided by total sales |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| Supplier                           | Purchases from the top five suppliers divided by total |
|                                    | purchases                                              |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| Lerner                             | (Operating revenue -- operating cost -- selling        |
|                                    | expenses -- administrative expenses) / operating       |
|                                    | revenue                                                |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| Lngdp                              | The natural logarithm of city-level GDP (in 10         |
|                                    | thousand RMB)                                          |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| ESG                                | Annual median score of Huazheng ESG rating             |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| FEPU                               | Perceived economic policy uncertainty index based on   |
|                                    | company annual reports                                 |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| lnCPRI                             | The natural logarithm of climate physical risk index   |
|                                    | developed by Guo et al. (2024)                         |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+
| HTD                                | The number of extreme hot days in a year               |
+------------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------+

[^1]: The data can be obtained from
    http://www.cnefn.com/data/download/climate-risk-database/

[^2]: The CRPI index is constructed based on daily observations from the
    U.S. National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) and
    considers four extreme climate events \-- extreme low temperature
    (LTD), extreme high temperature (HTD), extreme rainfall (ERD), and
    extreme drought (EDD). Historical observations from 1973 to 1992,
    are used to determine the 10th and 90th percentiles of temperature,
    the 95th percentile of rainfall, and the 5th percentile of humidity,
    which are then used as thresholds. The total number of days in each
    of the four categories that exceed these thresholds in each year is
    calculated from 1993 to 2023. The four sub-indices are then
    standardized through a min-max approach, and the mean value of these
    standardized sub-indices is used to represent the city specific
    CPRI. The data is open access on
    https://figshare.com/articles/dataset/Climate_Physical_Risk_Index_CPRI\_/25562229/1

[^3]: This index was also proposed by Guo et al. (2024), with original
    data recorded by the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration
    (NOAA). This extreme value is defined as temperatures exceeding the
    90th percentile of historical temperatures recorded between 1973 and
    1992. This method of defining extreme value is similar to the
    approach of Addoum, et al. (2020).

---
name: explain-code
description: Explains code with visual diagrams and analogies. Use when explaining how code works, teaching about a codebase, or when the user asks "how does this work?"
---

When explaining code, always include:

1. **Start with an analogy**: Compare the code to something from everyday life
2. **Draw a diagram**: Use ASCII art to show the flow, structure, or relationships
3. **Walk through the code**: Explain step-by-step what happens
4. **Highlight a gotcha**: What's a common mistake or misconception?

Keep explanations conversational. For complex concepts, use multiple analogies.
